zh.lifeSummary: 當Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby於大約1182年出生在英國戴文時，他的父親Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche47歲，母親Adelicia de Belmeis33歲。他於1203年與Margaret Bisset在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾阿什比 德 拉 祖結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和2個女兒的父母。他於1205年登記服兵役。他於1228年在英國戴文被列為sheriff of devonshire。他去世於1238年5月14日在英國英格蘭萊希斯特斯爾享年57歲。

nameMeanings.name: la
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Vietnamese Hung, Cuong, Anh, Thanh, Ha, Hoang, Tuan, Chau, Hao, Hien, Hoa, Hue, Nam, Phong, Sinh, Tuong, Min, Tam, Tanh, Thai, Tham, Tinh, Yeong.  Chinese Hong, Hang, Sang, Tong, Chan, Chi, Hwa Ja, Hyung, Kam, Ki Bong, Kin, Man.
Vietnamese: from the Chinese surname 羅, see   Luo   1.
Vietnamese (Lã): from the Chinese surname 呂, see Lu 6 and 3 below.

variants.name: Luo
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Chinese Wei, Jian, Yi, Ping, Yong, Zhen, Feng, Hong, Ming, Jin, Bin, Chen, Hai, Lan, Min, Huan, Hung, Shen, Tian.

Mandarin form of the surname 羅, meaning ‘net for catching birds’ or ‘to collect’ in Chinese: (i) from Luo (羅), the name of an ancient state (located in present-day Hubei province). After it was annexed by the state of Chu during the early Spring and Autumn period (770–476  BC ), people from the state migrated southwards and adopted Luo (羅) as their surname. (ii) from the Po Duo Luo (破多羅) and Chi Luo (叱羅) families from the Xianbei ethnic group in northern China, who changed their original surnames to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iii) from the personal name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅), leader of an ancient Turkic tribe who are believed to have migrated to China during the Tang dynasty (618–907  AD ). His descendants inherited his name Hu Se Luo (斛瑟羅) as their surname and shortened it to 羅 during the Northern Wei dynasty (386–534  AD ). (iv) from the name of one of the seven families from the Bandun Man, an ethnic group residing in ancient southwestern China (located mainly in present-day Sichuan province).

nameMeanings.name: Zouche
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: Zaucha
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Polish Andrzej, Casimir, Franciszek, Kazimierz, Krzysztof, Mieczyslaw, Rafal, Wojciech.
Polish: descriptive nickname from za uchem ‘behind the ear’, denoting someone who had something behind one of his ears. Compare Zoucha .

nameMeanings.name: Roger
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: From an Old French personal name, Rog(i)er, of Germanic (Frankish) origin, from hrōd ‘fame’ + gār, gēr ‘spear’. This was adopted by the Normans and introduced by them to Britain, replacing the native Old English form Hrōðgār. Roger was one of the most popular boys' names throughout the medieval period, but less so after the Reformation, though it has continued in regular use to the present day. Roger, Count of Sicily ( c.1031–1101 ), son of Tancred, recovered Sicily from the Arabs. His son, also called Roger, ruled Sicily as king, presiding over a court noted for its splendour and patronage of the arts.

variants.name: Rodger
meanings: Variant spelling of   Roger  , in part from the surname derived from the given name in the Middle Ages.

historicEvents.title: Magna Carta
historicEvents.description: King John of England agreed to a charter of rights called the Magna Carta. The document was originally drafted by the Archbishop of Canterbury to establish peace between King John and a group of rebel barons. The Magna Carta was completed in 1215 and is now considered to be one of the greatest constitutional documents of all time.

historicEvents.title: France Declares War on England
historicEvents.description: France declared war on England as Louis VIII of France attacked Poitou and northern Gascony.

en.lifeSummary: When Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby was born about 1182, in Devon, England, his father, Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche, was 47 and his mother, Adelicia de Belmeis, was 33. He married Margaret Bisset in 1203, in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 2 daughters. He registered for military service in 1205. In 1228, his occupation is listed as sheriff of devonshire in Devon, England. He died on 14 May 1238, in Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 57.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby est né environ 1182, à Devon, Angleterre, son père, Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche, avait 47 ans et sa mère, Adelicia de Belmeis, avait 33 ans. Il a épousé Margaret Bisset en 1203, à Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 2 filles. Il s'est inscrite au service militaire en 1205. En 1228, sa profession de son indiquée est sheriff of devonshire à Devon, Angleterre. Il est décédé le 14 mai 1238, à Leicestershire, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 57 ans.

Er hat 1203 in Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, England, United Kingdom Margaret Bisset geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Er hat sich 1205 zum Militärdienst angemeldet. 1228 ist sein Beruf als sheriff of devonshire in Devon, England aufgeführt. Er starb am 14. it.lifeSummary: Quando Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby è nato il circa 1182 nel Devon, England, il suo padre, Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche, aveva 47 anni e il suo madre, Adelicia de Belmeis, aveva 33 anni. Lui sposato Margaret Bisset nel 1203, nel Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 2 figlie. Si è arruolato nell'esercito nel 1205. Nel 1228, la sua occupazione è indicata come sheriff of devonshire nel Devon, England. Morì il 14 maggio 1238, nel Leicestershire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 57 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashbyが約1182年にイギリスデボンで生まれた時，父Alan de Porhoet de la Zoucheは47歳，母Adelicia de Belmeisは33歳であった。1203年にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアアシュビー ド ラ ゾウチでMargaret Bissetと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼は1205年に兵役登録をした。1228年，イギリスデボンでの職業はsheriff of devonshireと記録されている。彼は1238年5月14日にイギリスイギリスレアイセステルシュアイアで57歳で死去した。

ko.Ashby, Leicestershire, England: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.Ashby-de-la-Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치
ko.lifeSummary: Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby(이)가 대략 1182년 영국 데폰에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche(은)는 47세였고, 그의 어머니 Adelicia de Belmeis(은)는 33세였다. 그는 1203년 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르 애스h비 데 라 즈우치에서 Margaret Bisset(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1205년에 군복무를 위해 등록했다. 1228년, 그의 직업은 영국 데폰에서 sheriff of devonshire이었다. 그는 1238년 5월 14일 영국 잉글랜드 레이스스터실르에서 57세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.Ashby, Leicestershire, England: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom

pt.Ashby-de-la-Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom
pt.lifeSummary: Quando Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby nasceu aproximadamente 1182, em Devon, Inglaterra, seu pai, Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche, tinha 47 anos e sua mãe, Adelicia de Belmeis, tinha 33 anos. Ele casou-se com Margaret Bisset em 1203, em Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 2 filhas. Ele alistou-se no serviço militar em 1205. Em 1228, sua profissão aparece como sheriff of devonshire em Devon, Inglaterra. Ele faleceu em 14 de maio de 1238, em Leicestershire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 57 anos.

ru.Ashby, Leicestershire, England: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.Ashby-de-la-Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby родился около 1182 г. в местности девон, Англия, его отцу по имени Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche было 47 лет, а матери, которую звали Adelicia de Belmeis, 33. Он женился на женщине по имени Margaret Bisset в 1203 г. в местности ашби де ла зоуч, лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 2 дочери. В 1205 году он поступил на военную службу. В 1228 годуработал по профессии sheriff of devonshire в местности девон, Англия. Он умер 14 мая 1238 г. в местности лисестиршир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 57 лет.

es.Ashby-de-la-Zouch, Leicestershire, Engla: Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido
es.lifeSummary: Cuando Roger la Zouche Lord of Ashby nació aproximadamente 1182, en Devon, Inglaterra, su papá, Alan de Porhoet de la Zouche, tenía 47 años y su mamá, Adelicia de Belmeis, tenía 33 años. Se casó con Margaret Bisset en 1203, en Ashby de la Zouch, Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 2 hijas. Se enlistó en el ejército en 1205. En 1228, su ocupación registrada era sheriff of devonshire en Devon, Inglaterra. Murió el 14 de mayo de 1238, en Leicestershire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 57 años.
